title: Dettol Big and Strong Bathroom Wipes, 25 Count (6 x 25, Total 150 Wipes), Extra Strength, Tough on Soap Scum and Limescale, Biodegradable
features: ANTIBACTERIAL DEFENCE: Dettol Antibacterial Big & Strong Bathroom Wipes kills 99.9% of bacteria;
DOUBLE THE CLEANING POWER: Dettol Antibacterial Big & Strong Bathroom Wipes are tough on dirt, soap scum and limescale;
BIGGER AND STRONGER: Dettol Antibacterial Big & Strong Bathroom Wipes are 2 x stronger than regular Dettol cleansing surface wipes for tougher cleaning occasions;
MULTIPURPOSE: Suitable for bathroom disinfection, bathroom sinks, baths & taps, toilet seats, glazed tiles, shower screens, glass surfaces, vinyl & sealed laminated floors, and linoleum;
SPARKLING SURFACES: Dettol Antibacterial Big & Strong Bathroom Wipes leave surfaces sparkling clean, with a long-lasting fragrance.
description: Product Description Dettol Antibacterial Power & Pure Bathroom Wipes eliminate 99.9% of bacteria & viruses* found on bathroom surfaces. Choose these antibacterial wipes to get tough on bathroom grease, stains and soap scum. For a sparkling finish with no harsh residue, suitable for all your bathroom cleaning tasks. *See information on pack. Use disinfectants safely. Always read the label and product information before use. Ingredients Bathroom Wipes Directions Pull back the resealable cover, pull out wipe. Reseal after each usage & store cover facing down to avoid drying out. Wipe surface for a hygienic clean and then dispose of wipe. Safety Warning Not suitable for: Porous surfaces, Carpet, Upholstery, Fabric, Marble, Brass, Copper, Unwaxed Vinyl or Unfinished Wood, nor toys and food contact surfaces. Use only on hard non-porous surfaces. Not for personal use. Keep out of reach of children. Under no circumstance should Dettol products be swallowed. IF SWALLOWED: Call a poison centre or Doctor / physician if you feel unwell. Manufacturer Contact Information Wellcroft House Wellcroft Road Slough Sl1 4Aq See more
